channel.title: Ashwin Labs Notes
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Ashwin Labs Notes

item.title: Designing Gate Checks in AI Systems
item.description: Why Generation Alone Is Not Enough There is a moment in every AI system where everything feels like it’s working. You ask a question.

item.title: Explaining Procurement Decisions with Agentic RAG- A Case Study
item.description: There’s a particular kind of question that looks simple---right up until you try to answer it.

item.title: Planning in AI Agents
item.description: How Systems Decide Before They Answer Some questions cannot be answered directly. They require decisions.

item.title: Not All AI Agents Are the Same - A Practical Guide to Agent Types
item.description: There is a strange thing that happens once a technical idea becomes popular. The word starts getting used for everything.

item.title: Deconstructing the AI Agent
item.description: “AI agent” has become one of those terms that sounds impressive but often hides more than it explains. A chatbot is called an agent.

item.title: From Prompts to Agents - Designing Decision Loops
item.description: At this point, you’ve seen the progression: Prompts → getting better outputs Debugging → fixing failures ReAct → enabling actions Tool calling → separating decision and execution Now comes the real shift.

item.title: Hard-Codes Workflows vs AI Agents (ReAct) - The Difference That Actually Matters
item.description: When people first encounter AI agents, the reaction is usually: “Wait…isn’t this just calling APIs with an LLM in between?” Not quite.

item.title: Prompt Engineering Is Not About Prompts
item.description: When people first hear the term prompt engineering, they usually assume it’s about asking better questions.

item.title: Building Reliable Agent Workflows
item.description: Why Reliability Matters Agent demos look impressive. Until they don’t.

item.title: Mermaid Cheatsheet
item.description: Summary Mermaid lets you create diagrams using plain text. This version is optimized for Quartz, avoiding nested backticks and parser issues.
